title: KM integration: SOP surfacing on incident create
description: When incident is created, publish NATS event. connexio-ai subscribes, embeds incident description, searches pgvector for relevant SOPs, returns top-3 with relevance scores. Results attached to incident record and visible in incident view.

title: EIDO JSON export
description: Implement EIDO-compatible (NENA-STA-021) JSON serialization for Incident. Globally unique incident tracking identifier. Export endpoint for CAD-to-CAD interoperability. Allows other CAD systems to consume incident data in standard format.

title: Document ingest pipeline
description: Upload → OCR (Docling) → chunk → embed (bge-m3 via Ollama) → store in pgvector + entity extraction → Neo4j. Supports PDF, Word, HTML sources. NATS event-driven (not manual scripts). Multi-tenant, role-aware. Replaces kustw8-core's manual ingest scripts.

title: KM integration: run log ingestion on close
description: When incident is closed, publish NATS event with full run log. connexio-ai ingests run log as new document: chunked, embedded, entity-extracted into Neo4j. Incident becomes searchable institutional memory. The flywheel.

title: Phase 4: Intelligence Layer
description: Dispatch recommendations on new incidents (embed→pgvector similarity→Qwen reasoning). Pattern analysis across incident history via Neo4j traversal. Proactive alerts: AIS anomaly detection, zone risk scoring, shadow fleet monitoring. AI always suggests, coordinator always decides.

title: APP-6D SIDC lookup for resource types
description: Research and implement SIDC (20-char symbol identification code) assignment for standard resource types: coast guard vessel, SAR helicopter, military vessel, land unit, etc. Used by COP map for correct NATO symbology rendering via milsymbol.js.

title: Incident domain model — PostgreSQL schema + sqlc
description: PostgreSQL schema for: agency, incident, command, command_member, resource, assignment, position, zone, alert. EIDO-compatible incident identifier. IAMSAR dual-track phase (uncertainty/alert/distress + operational status). Append-only timeline table. sqlc-generated Go types. golang-migrate migration files.

title: PostgreSQL connection pool with pgvector verification
description: internal/store/db.go: Connect() using pgx/v5 pgxpool, Ping(), PgvectorEnabled() query. Integration tests skip when DATABASE_URL not set. TDD: failing test first, then implementation. Verifies pgvector extension is active on connect.

title: Build CAD domain corpus
description: Collect and organize CAD/emergency services domain documents into ~/data/CAD/. Target: ICS-100/200/300/400 (FEMA, all free), APCO Common Incident Types, NENA EIDO standard, APCO Common Status Codes, emergency management doctrine. These form the CAD knowledge foundation independent of Kustwacht.

title: defgrid-ai FastAPI scaffold
description: services/defgrid-ai/ Python project with uv. pyproject.toml with fastapi, uvicorn, pydantic-settings, asyncpg, nats-py, neo4j, redis, ollama, sentence-transformers, langfuse. src/main.py with lifespan, src/config.py, src/routers/health.py. Tests pass. Docker image builds.

title: Incident lifecycle API
description: REST API for incident CRUD + state machine transitions. POST /api/v1/dispatch/incidents, GET, PATCH status. Validates transitions (can't go from resolved back to active). Returns full incident with timeline. chi router, JWT auth via Zitadel. Unit + integration tests.

title: Phase 1: Knowledge Foundation
description: KM layer first — fastest path to demonstrable value and warmest conversation with BF/Kustwacht. Document ingest pipeline, hybrid search (BM25+semantic), Dutch-language cited answers via Qwen/Ollama. Migrate kustw8-core's existing Kustwacht corpus — zero re-ingestion. Phase 1 alone is a better Connexio.

title: Zone management
description: Zone model: sea_area, srr (search and rescue region), border_zone, jurisdiction, search_area, aoo (area of operations). GeoJSON geometry storage. API for CRUD. Pre-loaded with North Sea sectors and Dutch SRR boundaries. Used for incident location context and COP overlays.

title: Go module scaffold
description: Init Go module (github.com/relogiks/defgridops). Create cmd/{api,worker,migrate,adapters}, internal/{core,cad,cop,km,store,transport}, pkg/ directory structure. Minimal main.go per cmd with health check. Tests pass. go build ./... works.

title: SAP HR/equipment adapter
description: NATS-publishing adapter that reads personnel and equipment from SAP (or mock SAP API for dev). Translates to internal Resource model. Publishes resource.updated events. Configurable pull interval. Enabled via ADAPTERS_SAP_ENABLED=true. Works with mock data when SAP not available.

title: COP map with incidents and resources
description: Browser-based operational picture: Leaflet/MapLibre map showing active incidents and resource positions in real-time. APP-6D military symbology rendering (milsymbol.js) for resources with app6_sidc set. Zone overlays (sea areas, jurisdictions). Consumes WebSocket feed.

title: Create defgridops git repository
description: Create ~/demos/defgridops/ as a new git repo with .gitignore (Go, Python, .env, volumes/, .worktrees/) and README. Relogiks-owned platform — independent of Connexio/BF branding.

title: Incident pattern analysis
description: Commander-level query: why do weekend SAR incidents in Q3 always need more resources? Neo4j traversal over multi-year incident history. Seasonal patterns, resource correlations. Qwen structured insight with supporting evidence. Exportable as briefing document.

title: Dispatch recommendations
description: On incident create: embed incident description → pgvector similarity search over past incidents → Neo4j: which resources were effective in similar cases → Qwen reasoning → structured recommendation (vessel, aircraft, notify agency). Displayed as suggestion panel — coordinator always decides.

title: Dutch-language RAG answers via Qwen/Ollama
description: Query → hybrid search results → graph traversal (Neo4j related entities/procedures) → Qwen 2.5 7B prompt → cited answer in Dutch. Fully local, no API keys, air-gapped. Langfuse tracing. Returns source document references with answer.

title: Full stack integration
description: Add defgrid-api and defgrid-ai services to docker-compose.yml. Dockerfile.api for Go binary (multi-stage). Both /health endpoints return ok. All containers healthy. docker-compose up -d brings up everything.

title: Docker Compose infrastructure stack
description: docker-compose.yml with: postgres+pgvector (pgvector/pgvector:pg16), redis:7-alpine, nats:2-alpine with JetStream, neo4j:5-community, zitadel. All with healthchecks. infra/postgres/init.sql enables pgvector extension. .env.example with all connection strings.

title: Real-time resource position WebSocket feed
description: WebSocket endpoint /ws/dispatch broadcasting: active incidents, resource positions, assignment statuses, incoming alerts. Redis for pub/sub between API instances. Browser client receives position updates as resources move. Staleness indicator when position data is stale.

title: Migrate kustw8-core document corpus
description: Migrate 2300+ existing Kustwacht documents from kustw8-core into connexio-ai ingest pipeline. Zero re-ingestion of already-embedded content if possible. Validate search quality against known queries from kustw8-core demo.

title: Phase 2: Incident Core (CAD)
description: Incident lifecycle (new→active→coordinating→resolved→closed), resource assignments, append-only run log. SAP adapter for personnel and equipment. KM integration: SOPs surface on incident create, run log ingested on close. Multi-agency first: providing_agency != requesting_agency on Assignment.

title: Resource assignment and run log
description: Assignment model: resource→incident with providing_agency!=requesting_agency support (Unified Command). Status transitions: dispatched→en_route→on_scene→returning. Append-only run log entries on each transition. API: POST /api/v1/dispatch/incidents/{id}/assignments.

title: Proactive alert generation
description: Continuous background monitoring: AIS anomaly detection (shadow fleet, unusual patterns in sensitive zones), weather data + historical incidents → SAR risk scoring per zone. Proactive alert: zone X elevated risk — recommend pre-positioning resource Y. All local, no cloud calls.

title: Build COPS domain corpus
description: Collect and organize defense/COP domain documents into ~/data/COPS/. Target: Netherlands Defence Doctrine 2025, Defence White Paper 2024, Defence Strategy for Industry 2025-2029, Departementaal I-plan Defensie 2025-2027, NATO AJP-01/AJP-6 doctrine, IAMSAR Vol. I/II/III, KNRM annual reports, Kustwacht annual reports 2022-2024, EMSA publications, seabed infrastructure threat reports, shadow fleet analyses.

title: Hybrid search implementation
description: BM25 + semantic vector search over pgvector. Query → embed (bge-m3) → hybrid ranking → top-k results with source references. Fast enough for operational use (<2s). Multilingual: NL/EN/FR/DE.

title: AIS adapter (vessel positions)
description: NATS-publishing adapter consuming AIS NMEA/AIVDM stream (ITU-R M.1371). Decodes message types 1/2/3 (position: MMSI, lat/lon, speed, heading, nav_status) and type 5 (vessel static data). Publishes position.updated events. Links vessels to Resource records via MMSI.

title: Phase 3: Operational Picture (COP)
description: Real-time map with resource positions via WebSocket. AIS adapter for vessel positions (NMEA/AIVDM). Active incidents on map. Zone management (sea areas, jurisdictions, GeoJSON). APP-6D symbology rendering for military operators. Degrades gracefully — last known position with staleness indicator when feeds unavailable.

title: Phase 0: Walking Skeleton
description: Full stack running with all services healthy. Go API, connexio-ai FastAPI, and all infrastructure (postgres+pgvector, neo4j, redis, nats, zitadel) start and connect correctly via single docker-compose up. Nothing functional yet — just the foundation everything builds on.
